annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under 9 V.S.A. § 41a(a) — 12% per year, fixed by statute (simple interest). No pre- vs post-judgment split in the rate itself: Vermont applies the same 12% legal rate to prejudgment interest (as of right on… Verify against the statute; not legal advice.
